script.name: plugin.guilds.tabledata
script.sourceplaintext:
$page.id = get global variable: name='pageid.guilds' $Guilds.Data = get global variable: name='guilds.data' $menu.data = $Guilds.Data['menu.data'] $task.data = $Guilds.Data['tasks']
$table.data = array alloc: size=11 $table.data[0] = $a.table * Allow column sorting $table.data[1] = [TRUE] * Column Gap $table.data[2] = 5 * Do Icon $table.data[3] = [TRUE] * Video Display $table.data[6] = [FALSE] * Voice over $table.data[7] = [FALSE] * Show empty $table.data[8] = [TRUE] * Search table $table.data[9] = null
$var = sprintf: fmt='search.%s', $a.menu, null, null, null, null $table.data[10] = $menu.data[$var]
@ $items = [THIS] -> call script plugin.guilds.getdata : Menu=$a.menu Table=$a.table Guild=$a.guild Extra=$a.extra
@ $default.headings = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.columns : @ $headings.array = [THIS] -> call script plugin.guilds.gettable : MenuID=$a.menu Table=$a.table if $headings.array $array = $headings.array[0] $headings.count = size of array $array gosub sub.BuildHeadings $i = 0 while $i < $headings.count $heading = $array[$i] inc $i = $header.name = $headings.array[1][$heading] skip if $header.name $header.name = $default.headings[0][$heading] $header.size = $headings.array[2][$heading] skip if $header.size $header.size = $default.headings[1][$heading] $header.right = $default.headings[2][$heading] $header.sortable = $default.headings[3][$heading] $header.settings = $headings.array[3] if $header.settings $table.data[1] = $header.settings[1] $table.data[2] = $header.settings[0] $table.data[3] = $header.settings[2] $table.data[6] = $header.settings[3] $table.data[7] = $header.settings[4] $table.data[8] = $header.settings[5] $table.data[9] = $header.settings[6] end gosub sub.AddHeading end end
if $headings.count > 0 gosub sub.BuildRows $i = 0 $size = size of array $items while $i < $size $item = $items[$i] inc $i = gosub sub.GetRowData end end
return $table.data
sub.GetRowData: if $item -> exists $icon = $item ->create custom menu string object icon else $icon = null end
$object = $item $return = $item $sidemenu = null $description = null if $object -> exists $obj.name = $object -> get name end
if $headings.array $array = $headings.array[0] $array = clone array: $array if $object -> exists $description = $object -> get name end
if $a.menu == 'guild.board' if $a.table == 'tasks' $item = $task.data[$item] $description = $item[2][0] $description = read text: page=$page.id id=$description $return = $item[1] $type = $item[4] $type = $type[0] if $type == 'combat.md' $icon = create custom menu string gui icon: 90, Y=1 Width=10 Height=10 end $context = create context menu $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=4681 add context menu entry: menu=$context, text=$read.text, icon=74, returnvalue='task.brief', hotkey=null, disabled=[FALSE] $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104585 add context menu entry: menu=$context, text=$read.text, icon=12, returnvalue='task.accept', hotkey=null, disabled=[FALSE] $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=744 $text = $item[7]['money'] $text = convert number $text to string add context menu global info line: menu=$context, name=$read.text, value=$text $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=715 $text = $item[3] add context menu global info line: menu=$context, name=$read.text, value=$text $return = create menu return value: context menu, id=$object, menu=$context, dynamic=[FALSE] end
end
gosub sub.AddRow end endsub
sub.BuildHeadings: $array.pos = 0 $count = $headings.count * 5 $headings = array alloc: size=$count $table.data[4] = $headings endsub
sub.AddHeading: $headings[$array.pos] = $header.size inc $array.pos = $headings[$array.pos] = $header.name inc $array.pos = $headings[$array.pos] = $header.sortable inc $array.pos = $headings[$array.pos] = $header.right inc $array.pos = $headings[$array.pos] = $heading inc $array.pos = endsub
sub.BuildRows: $array.pos = 0 $size = size of array $items $count = ( $headings.count + 5 ) * $size $rows = array alloc: size=$count $table.data[5] = $rows endsub
sub.AddRow: $rows[$array.pos] = $icon inc $array.pos = $rows[$array.pos] = $return inc $array.pos = $rows[$array.pos] = $object inc $array.pos = $rows[$array.pos] = $sidemenu inc $array.pos = $rows[$array.pos] = $description inc $array.pos = gosub sub.ProcessRow copy array $array index 0 ... $headings.count into array $rows at index $array.pos $array.pos = $array.pos + $headings.count endsub
sub.ProcessRow: $array.size = size of array $array while $array.size dec $array.size = $array.item = $array[$array.size] if is datatype[ $array.item ] == DATATYPE_STRING @ $text = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.data : Column=$array.item Extra Info=$a.network For Sorting=[FALSE] Item=$object Item2=$a.extra do if $text $array[$array.size] = $text end end endsub
sub.CreateObjectSide: $sidemenu = create custom menu array set menu option: $sidemenu, icon=29
$text.cols = array alloc: size=2 $text = $object -> get ID code $text = create custom menu column string, position=0 length=100 right=[FALSE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[0] = $text $text = create custom menu string shield/hull: ship/station=$object Width=40 $text = create custom menu column string, position=-1 length=100 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[1] = $text add custom menu info line to array $sidemenu: text=$text.cols $text = $object -> get sector $text = $text -> get name add custom menu info line to array $sidemenu: text=$text
set menu option: $sidemenu, set title text=$obj.name endsub
sub.DrawSideItems: if $draw $draw.sort = sort table keys: table=$draw $draw.size = size of array $draw.sort $draw.i = 0 while $draw.i < $draw.size $draw.item = $draw.sort[$draw.i] inc $draw.i =
$text.cols = array alloc: size=2 $text = create custom menu column string, position=0 length=150 right=[FALSE] colour=null text=$draw.item $text.cols[0] = $text $text = ' ' if is datatype[ $draw.item ] == DATATYPE_WARE $text = $object -> get amount of ware $draw.item in cargo bay $text = convert number $text to string end $text = create custom menu column string, position=-1 length=60 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[1] = $text
add custom menu info line to array $sidemenu: text=$text.cols end end endsub
return null

line.text: create custom menu string object icon
create custom menu string gui icon:
add context menu global info line: menu=
add context menu global info line: menu=
create menu return value: context menu, id=
create custom menu column string, position=
create custom menu string shield/hull: ship/station=
create custom menu column string, position=
add custom menu info line to array
add custom menu info line to array
create custom menu column string, position=
create custom menu column string, position=
add custom menu info line to array
